steps.name: scripted control-plane dispatch contract
args: import re, subprocess, sys; p = subprocess.run(['cargo', 'test', '-q', '-p', 'control-plane', 'api::inference', '--', '--format', 'terse'], capture_output=True, text=True); sys.stdout.write(re.sub(r'finished in [0-9.]+s', 'finished in <time>', p.stdout)); sys.stderr.write(p.stderr); raise SystemExit(p.returncode)
steps.stdout:
running 33 tests
.................................
test result: ok. 33 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 0 measured; 153 filtered out; finished in <time>


running 0 tests

test result: ok. 0 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 0 measured; 0 filtered out; finished in <time>
